query:
SELECT 
  sr.id as run_id,
  sr.module_id,
  sr.scenario_id,
  sr.is_demo,
  sr.created_at,
  u.name as student_name,
  u.role,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as transaction_count,
  SUM(se.points_delta) as total_score
FROM scenario_runs sr
JOIN users u ON sr.user_id = u.id
LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.run_id = sr.id
LEFT JOIN scoring_events se ON se.run_id = sr.id
WHERE u.name = 'Expert Validator'
GROUP BY sr.id, sr.module_id, sr.scenario_id, sr.is_demo, sr.created_at, u.name, u.role
ORDER BY sr.id;
